---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-06
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+

| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-06                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: First migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox checklist is not applicable here because this was a finance record update, not an outbox message. Continue remaining OCR migrations.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to remaining 7 requested files
Report completion with all grounded references
next_step.observation: The first invoice file was updated successfully with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body.

function.message: Completed. I processed the next inbound note, ran the requested OCR/frontmatter migration on all 8 listed finance documents, preserved each original body verbatim beneath YAML frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used OCR + migration workflows and finance schema, preserved full original note bodies under frontmatter, and deleted processed inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 finance records for OCR workflow. Each listed file was read, had all required visible fields for the finance schema, and was updated in place with YAML frontmatter matching invoice/bill requirements from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md while keeping body text intact. Inbox completion rule from 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and process-next-inbox-item.md was satisfied by deleting the processed inbox file.
